message:
🐛 Configure tide for entire kubestellar org (#58)

Simplify tide queries to use org-wide configuration instead of
  listing individual repos. This ensures all repos in the org
  are covered by tide for automatic merging.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@kubestellar.io>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <andy@kubestellar.io>

files.patch:
@@ -101,21 +101,15 @@ tide:
   pr_status_base_urls:
     "*": https://prow2-private.kubestellar.io/
   merge_method:
-    kubestellar: merge
-    kubestellar/kubestellar: merge
+    kubestellar: merge  # org-wide default
     kubestellar/ui: squash
-    kubestellar/kubeflex: merge
-    kubestellar/infra: merge
     kubestellar/a2a: squash
     kubestellar/kubectl-plugin: squash
     kubestellar/docs: squash
   queries:
-    # no release notes
-    - repos:
-        - kubestellar/kubestellar
-        - kubestellar/kubeflex
-        - kubestellar/infra
-        - kubestellar/kubectl-plugin
+    # Org-wide query with DCO requirement
+    - orgs:
+        - kubestellar
       labels:
         - lgtm
         - approved
@@ -126,42 +120,6 @@ tide:
         - do-not-merge/invalid-owners-file
         - do-not-merge/work-in-progress
         - needs-rebase
-    # Query for UI repo without DCO requirement
-    - repos:
-        - kubestellar/ui
-      labels:
-        - lgtm
-        - approved
-      missingLabels:
-        - do-not-merge
-        - do-not-merge/hold
-        - do-not-merge/invalid-owners-file
-        - do-not-merge/work-in-progress
-        - needs-rebase
-    # Query for A2A repo without DCO requirement
-    - repos:
-        - kubestellar/a2a
-      labels:
-        - lgtm
-        - approved
-      missingLabels:
-        - do-not-merge
-        - do-not-merge/hold
-        - do-not-merge/invalid-owners-file
-        - do-not-merge/work-in-progress
-        - needs-rebase
-    # Query for docs repository without DCO requirement
-    - repos:
-        - kubestellar/docs
-      labels:
-        - lgtm
-        - approved
-      missingLabels:
-        - do-not-merge
-        - do-not-merge/hold
-        - do-not-merge/invalid-owners-file
-        - do-not-merge/work-in-progress
-        - needs-rebase
 
 branch-protection:
   orgs:
